strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Strong open-source and entrepreneurial track record (GISCollective founder, Fluent-Asserts creator)
concerns: Limited explicit AI/ML product or platform implementation experience in resume
No direct evidence of cloud-native or AI strategy leadership in prior roles
Lacks advanced degree (MS/PhD) in AI-related field as preferred qualification
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical breadth and depth with entrepreneurial experience, but lacks explicit evidence of AI product/platform leadership or cloud strategy roles. While his recent work includes AI-agent infrastructure, his resume does not highlight strategic AI differentiation or customer-facing advisory experience. The absence of an advanced AI degree further limits alignment with preferred qualifications.
